name: Praful Shrestha
summary: Business Data Science student at Aalborg University, blending advanced AI/ML architecture with strategic market applications. Proven experience engineering large-scale NLP pipelines, multi-agent systems, and LLM-driven text analytics to solve complex business problems. Highly motivated to apply advanced data science techniques to drive business decision-making and translate technical models into actionable executive insights.

expanded_bullets: Supported Mortgage Advisors by meticulously managing client relationships and streamlining loan application processes.
Acted as a crucial liaison, fostering seamless communication between clients, banks, and internal teams to ensure timely updates and process transparency.
Systematically collected and organized all necessary client documentation, accurately categorizing based on loan type, including refinance, pre-approval, investment, and owner-occupied.
Conducted thorough loan eligibility research utilizing Quickli, subsequently requesting and comparing optimal pricing options from various banks via their dedicated portals and the Flex platform.
Developed comprehensive product comparisons in Excel and BrokerWizard, empowering clients to make informed decisions on suitable loan options.
Constructed detailed loan applications within BrokerWizard and expertly coordinated their submission through BrokerEngine, facilitating smooth handover to operations and banking partners.
Proactively monitored loan approval statuses, efficiently uploaded supplementary documents in Flex/FMS, and maintained continuous, clear communication with banks to expedite approvals.
Managed the entire property valuation process, requesting AVM, desktop, and full valuations, alongside property reports, and diligently handled settlement updates with clients and banks.
Leveraged a suite of tools including BrokerEngine (CRM), Quickli, Flex, LastPass, and Excel to deliver exceptional client servicing and optimize loan processing workflows.
Maintained scrupulous financial records, ensuring absolute accuracy and strict compliance with all VAT regulations.
Managed the end-to-end payroll process, accurately calculating wages, deductions, and preparing monthly financial statements for timely distribution.
Prepared detailed monthly financial statements, including income statements and balance sheets, providing critical insights into the company's fiscal health.
Assisted in the strategic monitoring of pricing structures, identifying cost-saving opportunities and contributing to margin optimization.
Monitored and tracked operational expenses rigorously, identifying discrepancies and implementing corrective measures to maintain budgetary control.
Collaborated with the management team to analyze financial data, contributing to informed decision-making regarding cost efficiency and revenue generation.
Reconciled bank statements and ledgers monthly, ensuring data integrity and identifying any financial discrepancies for prompt resolution.
Provided essential support to the loan processing department, assisting with data entry and document verification for various loan applications.
Actively engaged in customer service activities, addressing client inquiries, providing account information, and ensuring a positive banking experience.
Maintained meticulous daily records of all banking activities, accurately tracking bank expenses, new account openings, and critical transactions in physical and digital registers.
Ensured comprehensive and accurate documentation across all banking operations, verifying forms and client information to uphold regulatory standards.
Gained practical, hands-on experience in core banking operations, including transaction processing, account management, and regulatory compliance.
Assisted senior staff in preparing daily transaction reports, contributing to the bank's operational transparency and record-keeping efficiency.
Developed a foundational understanding of financial services and customer relationship management within a regulated banking environment.
Utilized Microsoft Excel to accurately input, manage, and meticulously organize large datasets related to inventory and production records.
Performed rigorous quality checks on all entered data, identifying and correcting discrepancies to ensure high data accuracy and integrity.
Assisted in compiling weekly and monthly reports by extracting relevant data from organized spreadsheets, supporting operational analysis.
Collaborated with team members to streamline data entry processes, contributing to improved efficiency and reduced error rates.
Developed proficiency in data handling and basic spreadsheet functions, enhancing analytical support capabilities for the team.
Contributed to maintaining organized digital archives of company information, ensuring easy retrieval and accessibility for various departments.
Gained practical exposure to data management within an industrial setting, understanding its importance for business operations.
Efficiently managed all front-desk operations, serving as the primary point of contact for clients, visitors, and vendors.
Created and processed bills for program enrollees, ensuring accuracy and timely delivery of financial statements.
Maintained meticulous records of incoming payments and tracked program-related expenses, supporting financial oversight.
Ensured accurate documentation for all client interactions and administrative tasks, maintaining organized filing systems.
Facilitated smooth communication flow between clients and the administrative team, effectively relaying messages and scheduling appointments.
Managed the reception area, ensuring a welcoming and professional environment for all visitors.
Handled incoming and outgoing correspondence, including emails and physical mail, maintaining efficient communication channels.

projects.name: Multi-Agent ESG Patent Classification System
expanded_bullets: Architected an advanced, autonomous multi-agent AI system, assigning specialized 'advocate,' 'skeptic,' and 'judge' personas to enhance document evaluation.
Enabled the multi-agent system to intelligently evaluate and critically debate technical documents for nuanced ESG compliance, mimicking human expert review.
Leveraged QLoRA (Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning) to meticulously fine-tune a foundational Large Language Model, establishing it as the specialized 'brain' for the advocate agent.
Executed model fine-tuning on Aalborg University's high-performance, GPU-accelerated AI-LAB cluster, achieving optimal computational efficiency and model performance.
Successfully deployed and validated the multi-agent debate workflow, which accurately classified patents under the Y02 climate change mitigation category.
Automated complex market research processes for ESG patent analysis, significantly reducing manual effort and improving classification consistency and speed.
Presented project findings demonstrating the system's efficacy in identifying and categorizing patents relevant to climate change mitigation strategies.

projects.name: AI Detection & Topic Modeling of Danish News Articles (1.2M+ articles)
expanded_bullets: Executed large-scale data processing and cleaning of over 1.2 million Danish news articles using Pandas for data manipulation.
Optimized data storage and retrieval efficiency through Parquet optimization and implemented parallel chunk-based batch processing in a secure AI-LAB HPC environment.
Applied both zero-shot and few-shot text classification techniques utilizing multilingual NLI models to accurately categorize diverse topics within the news corpus.
Developed and deployed an effective methodology for detecting AI-generated content across the vast dataset, addressing emerging concerns in media integrity.
Implemented advanced BERTopic modeling, integrating E5 sentence embeddings, UMAP for dimensionality reduction, and HDBSCAN for robust clustering, to uncover latent discourse themes.
Visualized complex topic structures and relationships, generating insightful representations for enhanced interpretability and stakeholder understanding.
Analyzed and presented key findings from the topic modeling exercise, revealing significant trends and shifts in Danish public discourse over time.

projects.name: LLM-Based Risk Analysis of S&P 500 Earnings Calls
expanded_bullets: Engineered a sophisticated LLM-powered pipeline specifically designed to systematically extract structured corporate risk data from raw earnings call transcripts.
Designed and implemented a stringent JSON schema using Pydantic, ensuring rigorous validation and enforcement of structured output formats from the LLM.
Utilized advanced prompt engineering techniques to guide the LLM, guaranteeing consistent, accurate, and structured data extraction aligned with predefined schemas.
Constructed a complex company-risk bipartite knowledge graph using the NetworkX library, illustrating interconnections between companies and various risk factors.
Visualized systemic market risks across diverse economic sectors, providing a comprehensive and interpretable overview for strategic decision-making.
Developed a scalable solution capable of processing large volumes of unstructured earnings call data into actionable, quantitative risk intelligence.
Presented findings and visualizations to demonstrate the pipeline's capability in identifying critical risk indicators and their propagation across the S&P 500.

education.degree: Economics and Business Administration / MSc Business Data Science
